name: Savory Beef
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Round steak, cut into 1/2 x 1/2 c Chopped celery
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, heat oil over medium heat.
2. Add beef and brown in batches until browned on all sides.
3. Add onion and garlic; cook, stirring, until onions are transparent.
4. Stir in flour until the meat cubes are coated.
5. Add mushrooms with juice and celery.
6. In a small bowl, combine remaining ingredients (salt, pepper, sour cream, chives).
7. Mix well and pour over the meat.
8. Toss to coat evenly.
9. Transfer mixture to a greased 2-quart casserole dish.
10. Cover and bake at 325°F for 1 1/4 to 1 1/2 hours until meat is tender.
11. Sprinkle with chopped chives before serving.
